records.name: Community Services League
records.free_claim: Provides emergency rent assistance as grant-based aid (not a loan) to people in need; nonprofit founded 1916. Note: CSL also offers separate small-dollar loans, but its rent help is emergency assistance.
records.nonprofit_claim: Established nonprofit organization (since 1916) serving the Kansas City metro with emergency assistance.
records.what: Emergency rent assistance, utility help, food, and family stabilization services for low-income residents.

records.name: Metro Lutheran Ministry - Central Office
records.free_claim: Grant-based (non-repayment) emergency funding for rent or utilities to help clients weather a temporary crisis and prevent homelessness.
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit ministry serving the bi-state KC metro (Jackson, Clay, Platte MO; Johnson, Wyandotte KS).
records.what: Emergency rent and utility assistance; applications open online at 9am on the 15th of each month.

records.name: Metro Lutheran Ministry - Northland Office
records.free_claim: Grant-based (non-repayment) emergency funding for rent or utilities to prevent homelessness.
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit ministry serving the Northland (Clay and Platte counties).
records.what: Emergency rent and utility assistance for Northland (Clay/Platte) residents.

records.name: Metro Lutheran Ministry - Wyandotte Office
records.free_claim: Grant-based (non-repayment) emergency funding for rent or utilities to prevent homelessness.
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit ministry serving Wyandotte County, KS.
records.what: Emergency rent and utility assistance for Wyandotte County residents.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Northeast Kansas - Overland Park Family Support Center
records.free_claim: Provides direct financial assistance for past-due rent and utility payments to eligible low-income households (charitable aid, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit (Catholic Charities of Northeast Kansas) serving Johnson County.
records.what: Rent and utility assistance; appointments made by phone (call Monday mornings from 8:30am to check availability).

records.name: Catholic Charities of Northeast Kansas - Olathe Family Support Center
records.free_claim: Provides direct financial assistance for past-due rent and utility payments to eligible low-income households (charitable aid, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit (Catholic Charities of Northeast Kansas) serving Johnson County.
records.what: Rent and utility assistance, plus clothing and prescription help, for low-income individuals and families.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Northeast Kansas - Kansas City (Wyandotte County) Family Support Center
records.free_claim: Provides direct financial assistance for past-due rent and utility payments to eligible Wyandotte County residents (charitable aid, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit (Catholic Charities of Northeast Kansas) serving Wyandotte County.
records.what: Rent, utility, and food pantry assistance for Wyandotte County residents; appointments by phone.

records.name: Community Action Agency of Greater Kansas City (CAAGKC)
records.free_claim: Emergency rent assistance, utility payments, and crisis services funded by federal Community Services Block Grant (grant-based, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Nonprofit Community Action Agency, federally funded via CSBG (HHS) serving Jackson and Platte counties.
records.what: Emergency crisis services including rent assistance, utility payments, emergency shelter, and case management.

records.name: The Salvation Army - Kansas & Western Missouri Division (Rent & Utility Assistance)
records.free_claim: Caseworkers provide qualifying clients with rent/utility assistance, food, and other emergency aid (charitable grant, not a loan); income at or below 200% of federal poverty guideline.
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit (The Salvation Army) serving the KC metro including KCK/KCMO, Johnson, Wyandotte, Jackson, Clay, and Platte counties.
records.what: Emergency rent and utility assistance; apply by calling 1-816-756-5392 and selecting the assistance option.

records.name: The Salvation Army - Independence Corps
records.free_claim: Assists area residents with basic needs including rent/utility and emergency assistance (charitable grant, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit (The Salvation Army) corps serving Independence and eastern Jackson County.
records.what: Emergency assistance programs for area residents including rent/utility help and emergency shelter (Crossroads).

records.name: Community Assistance Council (CAC)
records.free_claim: Nonprofit emergency assistance agency providing rent/utility help and basic-needs support to south Kansas City residents (charitable aid, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Local nonprofit emergency assistance council serving south Kansas City / south Jackson County.
records.what: Emergency assistance including rent and utility help, food pantry, and basic needs.

records.name: Community LINC
records.free_claim: Provides emergency rent and utility assistance and homelessness-prevention support to homeless and at-risk families (charitable/grant aid, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Nonprofit serving homeless and at-risk families in the Kansas City area; supported in part by Jackson County COMBAT.
records.what: Emergency rent and utility assistance, interim furnished apartments, and self-sufficiency programs for homeless/at-risk families.

records.name: United Way of Greater Kansas City 211
records.free_claim: Free information and referral service connecting residents to rent, utility, and emergency assistance programs across the 23-county KC region (no cost to caller).
records.nonprofit_claim: United Way of Greater Kansas City nonprofit; regionally accredited information and referral service.
records.what: Dial 211 or use 211KC.org to find and get referred to rent assistance and homelessness-prevention programs; 24/7 with interpretation services.

records.name: Missouri Housing Development Commission (MHDC) - Emergency Solutions Grant (ESG) / Housing Emergency Solutions Program
records.free_claim: State-administered HUD Emergency Solutions Grant funds distributed to local agencies for homelessness-prevention and rapid re-housing rental assistance (grant, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Government program: Missouri Housing Development Commission (state agency) administering federal HUD ESG funds.
records.what: Statewide emergency homelessness-prevention and short-term rental/housing assistance distributed through partner agencies; apply through local subgrantees or 211.

records.name: Johnson County Rental Arrears Assistance Program
records.free_claim: County government program providing assistance with past-due (arrears) rent to eligible low-income Johnson County residents (grant, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Government program operated by Johnson County, Kansas (Aging and Human Services).
records.what: By-application rental arrears assistance for eligible Johnson County, KS residents.

records.name: Society of St. Vincent de Paul - St. Louis
records.what: Catholic charity providing emergency rent and utility assistance, food, clothing, and one-on-one outreach across 13 counties in the St. Louis metro area.
records.free_claim: Provides direct emergency aid (grants, not loans); provided more than $10.1 million in direct aid in FY2025.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic nonprofit charity operating for more than 180 years.

records.name: The Salvation Army Greater St. Louis Metropolitan Area
records.what: Provides emergency rental and utility assistance to families in St. Louis City and the surrounding metro, plus shelter and other social services.
records.free_claim: Emergency assistance grants to help with rent/mortgage and utilities; not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: Catholic Charities of St. Louis
records.what: Network offering housing counseling, rent and utility assistance, foreclosure help, permanent supportive housing, and over 100 programs across the St. Louis region.
records.free_claim: Provides rent and energy bill assistance plus rental/utility help in supportive housing; assistance, not loans.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic nonprofit charity.

records.name: Urban League of Metropolitan St. Louis
records.what: Nonprofit providing rental and utility assistance, mortgage services, homeownership help, food, and financial literacy education in the St. Louis metro.
records.free_claim: Provides rental and utility assistance as direct aid; not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Nonprofit civil rights and community service organization.

records.name: Community Action Agency of St. Louis County (CAASTLC)
records.what: Community Action Agency offering eviction prevention, homeless intervention and stabilization, and rental housing services including help with rent, security/utility deposits, and emergency home repair grants. Serves St. Louis County.
records.free_claim: Provides assistance for rent, deposits, and emergency repairs as grants, not loans.
records.nonprofit_claim: Nonprofit Community Action Agency.

records.name: Sts. Joachim and Ann Care Service (The Care Service) - Housing Assistance
records.what: Nonprofit providing emergency housing assistance: rent, mortgage, and utility payments to prevent eviction/foreclosure/shut-off, plus rental deposits and home repairs. Serves St. Charles, Lincoln, and Warren Counties.
records.free_claim: Assistance is a grant, not a loan; for households at or below 50% of area median income.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic faith-based nonprofit care service.

records.name: St. Charles County Homeless Prevention Program
records.what: County government program providing homelessness-prevention assistance to St. Charles County residents.
records.free_claim: Government homelessness-prevention assistance; not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: County government program.

records.name: Jefferson Franklin Community Action Corporation (JFCAC) - Franklin County Family Resource Center
records.what: Community Action Agency offering housing/rental assistance, energy assistance, weatherization, and crisis intervention for income-qualified families in Franklin County.
records.free_claim: Rental assistance with family portion based on income; not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Nonprofit Community Action Agency.

records.name: Missouri Housing Development Commission (MHDC) - Housing Emergency Solutions / Renter Assistance
records.what: State housing agency administering HUD Emergency Solutions Grant (ESG) funds for homelessness prevention, rapid re-housing, and emergency shelter, plus renter assistance resources statewide.
records.free_claim: Government grant-funded homelessness prevention and rental assistance; not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: State government housing agency.

records.name: United Way 2-1-1 Missouri
records.what: Statewide information and referral line connecting residents to rent, utility, and basic-needs assistance resources in their area.
records.free_claim: Free referral service connecting callers to no-cost assistance programs.
records.nonprofit_claim: United Way nonprofit-operated referral service.

records.name: Voluntary Action Center (VAC)
records.what: Local nonprofit providing financial assistance with basic and emergency needs, including rent/housing assistance, to Boone County residents.
records.free_claim: Provides financial assistance with basic and emergency needs (grant-based emergency aid, not a loan) to Boone County residents.
records.nonprofit_claim: Described as a local nonprofit responding to the basic needs of individuals in the community.

records.name: St. Vincent de Paul Society (Columbia/Boone County)
records.what: Catholic charity assisting Columbia/Boone County residents mostly with rent and utility bills; all assistance requests considered.
records.free_claim: Assists residents mostly with rent and utility bills as charitable aid (grant, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: Charity organization of the Catholic Church (faith-based nonprofit).

records.name: Love Columbia
records.what: 501(c)(3) faith-based nonprofit that coordinates rent/housing assistance and connects Boone County residents to emergency financial help.
records.free_claim: Coordinates and provides access to rent/emergency financial assistance for low-income residents; not a loan product.
records.nonprofit_claim: States it is a 501(c)(3) tax-exempt non-profit organization.

records.name: Central Missouri Community Action (Boone County / Family Resource Office)
records.what: Community Action Agency providing financial assistance with rent and motel assistance (per grant guidelines) to current Boone County residents; also operates Cole County office in Jefferson City.
records.free_claim: Provides financial assistance with rent (and motel assistance) based on availability and grant guidelines; grant aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Central Missouri Community Action is a nonprofit Community Action Agency.

records.name: The Salvation Army Jefferson City (Center for Hope)
records.what: Faith-based charity providing emergency assistance with mortgage/rent and utility bills to help families keep their homes; family shelter and social services.
records.free_claim: Provides emergency assistance to help with mortgage/rent and utility bills to keep families in their homes (charitable aid, not a loan); applications accepted after the 1st of each month.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a faith-based charitable nonprofit.

records.name: Douglass Community Services, Inc.
records.what: Private nonprofit human services agency providing deposit, rent, and utility assistance to income-eligible clients in the Hannibal area.
records.free_claim: Financial Assistance program helps income-eligible clients with deposit/rent/utility assistance (once per 12-month period); grant aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Private, not-for-profit human services agency.

records.name: Community Action Partnership of Northeast Missouri (CAPNEMO / NMCAA)
records.what: Community Action Agency serving Adair, Clark, Knox, Schuyler, and Scotland counties with energy crisis (ECIP), LIHEAP, and related assistance programs.
records.free_claim: Operates CSBG/LIHEAP/ECIP and related assistance programs that can help with rent/energy bills; grant aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Nonprofit Community Action Agency serving five northeast Missouri counties since 1965.

records.name: Missouri 211 (United Way) Emergency Assistance Helpline
records.what: Statewide helpline (dial 211) connecting low-income residents to rent, utility, and emergency assistance programs throughout Missouri.
records.free_claim: Free statewide referral line connecting residents to nonprofit/government rent and emergency assistance; the helpline and referrals are free.
records.nonprofit_claim: Operated by United Way (nonprofit).

records.name: The Salvation Army - Springfield (Emergency Social Services, Greene & Christian Counties)
records.free_claim: Emergency social services / rental assistance offered at no charge to low-income clients; call first business day of month to inquire about available rental assistance.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a national faith-based nonprofit charity.
records.what: Emergency rental assistance and utility/social services for low-income households in Greene and Christian counties.

records.name: Ozarks Area Community Action Corporation (OACAC) - Greene County / Housing Assistance
records.free_claim: Community Action Agency helps low-income residents with rental payments (grant assistance, not a loan).
records.nonprofit_claim: OACAC is the federally designated nonprofit Community Action Agency for Southwest Missouri.
records.what: Rental payment assistance for low-income residents across Barry, Christian, Dade, Dallas, Greene, Lawrence, Polk, Stone, Taney, and Webster counties.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Southern Missouri - Springfield
records.free_claim: Provides rent & mortgage assistance as grants funded through federal grants and rapid re-housing programs (not loans).
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities of Southern Missouri is a nonprofit faith-based charity.
records.what: Emergency rent/mortgage assistance and housing stability case management for low-income households; Springfield office serves Christian, Dallas, Douglas, Greene, Laclede, Ozark, Polk, Stone, Taney, Webster, Wright counties.

records.name: Crosslines Community Outreach (Council of Churches of the Ozarks)
records.free_claim: Nonprofit outreach providing emergency assistance and housing/resource help at no cost to low-income clients.
records.nonprofit_claim: Crosslines is a program of the Council of Churches of the Ozarks, a faith-based nonprofit.
records.what: Emergency assistance resource center including housing/rent referral and support for low-income households in the Springfield/Greene County area.

records.name: The Salvation Army - Joplin
records.free_claim: Offers rent assistance (with eviction notice, by appointment) and utility assistance at no charge to low-income clients.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a national faith-based nonprofit charity.
records.what: Emergency rental assistance, utility assistance and transitional housing for low-income residents of the Joplin area.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Southern Missouri - Joplin
records.free_claim: Provides rental and utility assistance and housing stability case management as charitable/grant assistance (not loans).
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities of Southern Missouri is a nonprofit faith-based charity.
records.what: Emergency rental assistance, utility assistance and housing stability case management; Joplin office serves Barton, Barry, Cedar, Dade, Jasper, Lawrence, McDonald, Newton counties.

records.name: The Salvation Army - Branson (Emergency Social Services, Stone & Taney Counties)
records.free_claim: Offers rent and utility bill assistance at no cost to Stone and Taney County residents.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a national faith-based nonprofit charity.
records.what: Emergency rent and utility assistance for low-income residents of Stone and Taney counties.

records.name: Christian Action Ministries (CAM) - Taney County
records.free_claim: Nonprofit faith-based ministry; care coaches help with rental assistance and other emergency needs at no charge.
records.nonprofit_claim: Christian Action Ministries is a non-denominational nonprofit founded by local churches in 1984.
records.what: Emergency assistance including rental assistance referral/support and food pantries for Taney and Stone County residents.

records.name: Help Give Hope
records.free_claim: Nonprofit assists children and families with rent, utilities and gas vouchers at no charge.
records.nonprofit_claim: Help Give Hope is a Southwest Missouri nonprofit charitable organization.
records.what: Assistance with rent, utilities, gas vouchers and educational help for children and families in Southwest Missouri.

records.name: Missouri 2-1-1 (United Way) - Housing/Rent Referral
records.free_claim: Free statewide referral line connecting Missourians to local nonprofits and Community Action Agencies that provide emergency rent and utility assistance.
records.nonprofit_claim: Operated by United Way as a nonprofit statewide information and referral service.
records.what: Statewide by-phone referral pathway (dial 2-1-1) to local emergency rental assistance, shelters and housing services across the Ozarks region.

records.name: Missouri Housing Development Commission (MHDC) - Housing Emergency Solutions / Eviction Diversion
records.free_claim: State agency administers federal Emergency Solutions Grant funds for homelessness prevention and short-term rental assistance through subgrantee nonprofits (grants, not loans).
records.nonprofit_claim: MHDC is a Missouri state governmental agency; funds are distributed via grants to nonprofit subrecipients.
records.what: Statewide by-application program providing homelessness-prevention and short-term rental assistance, plus Housing Stability and Eviction Diversion (HSED) for households with active eviction filings.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Kansas City-St. Joseph - Emergency Assistance
records.what: Emergency assistance including rent and utility assistance, food, clothing, hygiene products for low-income people in crisis. Over $1M in rent, utility, food and other assistance provided last year.
records.free_claim: Emergency assistance (rent/utility) described as assistance/help, not a loan; provided as charitable aid.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: The Salvation Army - St. Joseph (Messanie Street Corps)
records.what: Assists people in crisis with residential shelter, emergency assistance, clothing, and household items.
records.free_claim: Salvation Army emergency assistance is charitable aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: InterServ - Emergency, Rent, and Utility Assistance
records.what: Emergency, rent, and utility assistance plus food pantry and family assistance via a Housing Case Manager; serving St. Joseph for over 100 years. Emergency assistance/food pantry at Calvin Center, 1412 N 3rd.
records.free_claim: Provides emergency rent and utility assistance as charitable aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: InterServ is a longstanding community nonprofit/charity in St. Joseph.

records.name: Community Action Partnership of Greater St. Joseph
records.what: Community Action Agency serving Andrew, Buchanan, Clinton, and DeKalb Counties; administers anti-poverty programs and services including housing/rent-related assistance.
records.free_claim: Community Action Agency anti-poverty assistance programs (grant-based aid, not loans).
records.nonprofit_claim: Community Action Partnership is a nonprofit Community Action Agency.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Northeast Kansas - Topeka Family Support Center
records.what: Direct financial assistance for past-due rent and utility payments to eligible low-income individuals and families; also food, clothing, housing help. By appointment (call); walk-ins not accepted.
records.free_claim: Direct financial assistance for past-due rent/utilities to eligible households; charitable aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: The Salvation Army - Topeka
records.what: Emergency financial assistance including rent and utility help for low-income residents.
records.free_claim: Salvation Army emergency rent/utility assistance is charitable aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: Doorstep, Inc. (rent assistance via City of Topeka EAS Program)
records.what: Nonprofit supporting Topekans toward self-sufficiency; rent assistance requests are routed through the City of Topeka EAS (Equity. Access. Shelter.) program (call 785-368-9533 / EAS@topeka.org).
records.free_claim: Rent assistance via city/nonprofit EAS program; grant-based aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Doorstep, Inc. is a nonprofit/charity; partners with the municipal EAS program.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Northeast Kansas - Lawrence Family Support Center
records.what: Direct financial assistance for past-due rent and utility payments to eligible low-income households; also food, clothing, housing help. Rent/utility appointments made by phone (availability checks Thursday 9am).
records.free_claim: Direct financial assistance for past-due rent/utilities to eligible households; charitable aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: The Salvation Army - Lawrence
records.what: Rent and utility assistance, food pantry, crisis intervention, case management, and emergency temporary housing for families.
records.free_claim: Salvation Army rent/utility assistance is charitable aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Northern Kansas - Manhattan Office
records.what: Emergency financial assistance of up to $200 in a one-year period for rent, utilities, and/or prescriptions, depending on fund availability and qualifying status. Services based on need (not religion/race/nationality).
records.free_claim: Emergency financial assistance (grant up to $200/year) for rent/utilities; not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities of Northern Kansas is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: Shepherd's Crossing
records.what: Financial support for utilities, rent, and prescription medications, plus budget counseling and referrals, to residents of Riley County, Manhattan and St. George who have lived there at least one year.
records.free_claim: Provides rent/utility financial support as charitable aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Shepherd's Crossing is a faith-based/charitable nonprofit serving Riley County.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Northern Kansas - Salina Support Center
records.what: Emergency financial assistance of up to $200 in a one-year period for rent, utilities, and/or prescriptions, depending on fund availability and qualifying status. Main support center for the region.
records.free_claim: Emergency financial assistance (grant up to $200/year) for rent/utilities; not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities of Northern Kansas is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: The Salvation Army - Salina (N. Santa Fe Corps)
records.what: Social services including rent and utility assistance, food pantry, clothing, household items, and community meal. Appointment with a caseworker needed; ID and proof of income required.
records.free_claim: Salvation Army rent/utility assistance is charitable aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a faith-based nonprofit charity.

records.name: Kansas Housing Resources Corporation - Emergency Solutions Grant / Homelessness Prevention
records.what: Statewide Kansas housing agency administering Emergency Solutions Grant (ESG) for rapid re-housing and homelessness prevention, Tenant Based Rental Assistance (TBRA), and HOME-ARP. Not a direct provider; apply through local partner agencies.
records.free_claim: Government/HUD-funded rental subsidies and homelessness-prevention grants, not loans.
records.nonprofit_claim: KHRC is the state housing finance agency (quasi-governmental); funds delivered via nonprofit/government partners.

records.name: Missouri Housing Development Commission - Housing Emergency Solutions Program (ESG)
records.what: Statewide Missouri agency administering HUD Emergency Solutions Grant funds for street outreach, emergency shelter, homelessness prevention, and rapid re-housing; distributes funds to local Missouri agencies. Call 211 to find local providers.
records.free_claim: Government/HUD-funded homelessness-prevention and rapid re-housing grants, not loans.
records.nonprofit_claim: MHDC is the Missouri state housing agency (government); funds delivered via local nonprofit/government agencies.

records.name: Kansas 211 (United Way) - Rent Assistance referral line
records.what: Statewide free 24/7 information and referral line connecting Kansans to community rent and utility assistance resources and local providers.
records.free_claim: Free referral service connecting people to grant-based rent assistance; no cost, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Operated by United Way, a nonprofit charity.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Northern Kansas - Hays Office
records.free_claim: Provides emergency financial assistance for rent, utilities, and prescriptions to help individuals and families avoid eviction; grant-based direct assistance, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities of Northern Kansas, Inc. is a nonprofit 501(c)(3) Catholic social-services agency serving 31 counties in northern/central Kansas.
records.what: Emergency rent and utility assistance for low-income households facing eviction; Hays-area Emergency Assistance Coordinator Marlo Jensen.

records.name: First Call For Help of Ellis County, Inc.
records.free_claim: Provides emergency assistance through vouchers for needs such as rent and utilities to established Ellis County residents living on little or no income; assistance provided at no cost.
records.nonprofit_claim: States it is a community-supported 501(c)(3) agency; serving Ellis County since 1996.
records.what: Emergency rent/utility voucher assistance for established Ellis County residents in financial need.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Southwest Kansas - Dodge City Office
records.free_claim: Provides housing assistance including one-time/grant-based rental support and emergency financial support for families facing homelessness; nonprofit grant aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities is a nonprofit Catholic social-services organization that partners with local agencies and government programs to deliver housing assistance in southwest Kansas.
records.what: Emergency rent and housing assistance for low-income households in the Dodge City / Ford County area.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Southwest Kansas - Garden City Office
records.free_claim: Provides housing assistance including one-time/grant-based rental support and emergency financial support for families facing homelessness; nonprofit grant aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities is a nonprofit Catholic social-services organization serving southwest Kansas, partnering with local agencies and government programs.
records.what: Emergency rent and housing assistance for low-income households in the Garden City / Finney County area.

records.name: Catholic Charities of Southwest Kansas - Great Bend Office
records.free_claim: Provides housing assistance including grant-based rental support and emergency financial support for families facing homelessness; nonprofit grant aid, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities is a nonprofit Catholic social-services organization serving southwest/central Kansas counties.
records.what: Emergency rent and housing assistance for low-income households in the Great Bend / Barton County area (central Kansas).

records.name: Catholic Charities, Inc. (Wichita / South Central Kansas)
records.free_claim: Offers emergency rent/utility assistance and Rapid Re-Housing providing short- to medium-term rental and security-deposit assistance; grant-based aid, not a loan. Sedgwick County applicants call (316) 264-8344 ext. 4109 or 2-1-1.
records.nonprofit_claim: Catholic Charities, Inc. states it is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit serving south central and southeast Kansas (Sedgwick, Butler, Reno, and other counties).
records.what: Emergency rent/utility assistance and Rapid Re-Housing rental assistance for low-income, homeless, veteran, and DV-survivor households in south central Kansas.

records.name: The Salvation Army - South Central Area Command (Wichita)
records.free_claim: Emergency Social Services provides emergency rent/utility assistance and Rapid Re-Housing (covers a portion of rent with case management) to keep struggling families housed; grant assistance paid on behalf of the recipient, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a nonprofit faith-based (religious) charitable organization.
records.what: Emergency rent and utility assistance plus Rapid Re-Housing for low-income families in Sedgwick, Reno, and Butler Counties.

records.name: Kansas Housing Resources Corporation - Tenant Based Rental Assistance (TBRA)
records.free_claim: Federally funded (HOME) rental subsidy covering rent, security deposits, and/or utility deposits for income-eligible households; grant/subsidy assistance, no repayment.
records.nonprofit_claim: KHRC is a self-supporting, nonprofit, public corporation serving as the state's housing finance agency; TBRA is delivered through funded local agencies statewide.
records.what: Statewide tenant-based rental assistance for income-eligible households; apply through KHRC-funded agencies listed on the TBRA Service Providers / county map.

records.name: Kansas Housing Resources Corporation - Emergency Solutions Grant (ESG)
records.free_claim: HUD-funded program providing emergency shelter, rapid rehousing, and homelessness-prevention assistance (including rent help) for those homeless or at risk of losing housing within 14 days; grant aid, no repayment.
records.nonprofit_claim: KHRC is a self-supporting, nonprofit, public corporation administering ESG statewide through a network of nonprofit/government service providers.
records.what: Statewide homelessness-prevention and rapid-rehousing rental assistance via local ESG service providers; for individuals/families experiencing or at imminent risk of homelessness, unaccompanied youth under 25, and those fleeing domestic violence.

records.name: The Salvation Army - Kansas Utility & Rent Assistance
records.free_claim: Provides emergency rent and utility assistance to keep families struggling to pay basic bills in their homes; donations used to make payments directly to landlords/utility suppliers, not a loan.
records.nonprofit_claim: The Salvation Army is a nonprofit religious/charitable organization (GuideStar Platinum, ECFA, BBB accredited).
records.what: Statewide emergency rent and utility assistance via local Salvation Army offices; covers central/western Kansas counties (e.g., Black Hills Cares: Reno, Rice, Sedgwick, Seward, Sherman, Stevens, etc.; Kansas Gas Service Share the Warmth: 82 counties).

records.name: United Way 211 Kansas (Referral & Rent-Assistance Connection)
records.free_claim: Free, confidential information-and-referral service connecting Kansans to rental-assistance and housing programs; itself free to use, refers to grant-based nonprofit/government rent help.
records.nonprofit_claim: Operated by United Way (United Way of the Plains and partners), a nonprofit; statewide 2-1-1 referral network.
records.what: Statewide free referral line to find local emergency rent and housing assistance; dial 2-1-1, text ZIP to 898-211, or search 211Kansas.org.
